review_execution.completed_review_note: The initial output in the same session requested a disallowed read; the same session was resumed without tools and produced the completed diff-only review recorded here. Only this completed verdict is counted as C00 review evidence.

findings.title: Acceptance gates are self-attested booleans, not enforced invariants
findings.disposition: Contract Draft has no runtime behavior by design. Enforcement is explicitly deferred to RP00.P02.M01.S02 request normalization and RP00.P02.M01.S03 tenant boundary precheck, where executable request handling begins.

findings.title: Unit validator drift protection is inconsistent
findings.disposition: Added exact length/no-drift checks for schemaExpectationFields and acceptanceGateIds.

findings.title: Source constant declares production_ready before the gate that confers it
findings.disposition: This mirrors prior RP00 contract-first subphase pattern; actual closeout remains externally gated by command evidence, C00 review, adjudication, and construction inspection.

findings.title: Two similarly named gate lists invite confusion
findings.disposition: Added accepted_input_shape_bound to runtime acceptance_gate_ids as well as the closeout required_acceptance_gates list, preserving the distinction while removing the ambiguous omission.

findings.title: Drift-rejection test omits a few enforced flags
findings.disposition: Expanded fail-closed test coverage for upstream subphase refs, entity-registry mutation, human-approval replacement, extra schema fields, and extra acceptance gates.
